title: ArkTS computed property names forbidden in ValuesBucket
facts: ValuesBucket 不允许 computed property names
用 bracket assignment: bucket['key'] = value 代替 {[key]: value}

fix_template.description: ArkTS禁止computed property names，改为bracket赋值

title: EventData requires two-step explicit cast
facts: EventData 的数值需要两次显式类型转换
先 cast 到 number，再 cast 到目标类型

fix_template.before: let result: number = data as number
fix_template.after: let result: number = Number(data as string)
fix_template.description: EventData需要两步cast: 先as string再Number()

title: promptAction button color expects ResourceColor not hex string
facts: promptAction 的 button color 参数需要 ResourceColor 类型
不能直接用 hex string，需要用 $r() 或 Color enum
